title: マイルの先にあるもの

text_block_list.name: Host
text_block_list.text:
And now to introduce the Umamusume in the
center! With stellar performances in sprint, mile,
and medium-distance races...

text_block_list.name: Host
text_block_list.text:
And countless G1 victories! Her gallant running
has captivated audiences everywhere—ladies and
gentlemen, I give you Taiki Shuttle!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Howdy! I'm here to make y'all happy!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After initially aiming to become Umamusume of
the Year running only sprint and mile races, Taiki
Shuttle has improved far beyond my
expectations...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
No longer walled in by distance, she embarks for
new horizons.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Phew! We're finally back at the academy!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
You said it! I'm just glad I could make everyone
happy!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Huff, puff... Ah!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Oh, is that you, Suzuka? You restin' up after the
race?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, I guess so. But more than that, I needed to
make sure it was there...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: The place I'd like to see.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: The place you'd like to see? You mean...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: The view from the lead?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: That's right.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I've never stopped running for it, and yet I still
haven't reached it.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I'm always looking at your back instead.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One excels in mile races. The other excels in
medium-distance.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But Taiki Shuttle has shown tremendous growth
and successfully emerged victorious into
medium-distance territory.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Are you happy, Suzuka?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I'm real happy I got to go head-to-head with ya,
Suzuka.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Of course, I love spendin' time with my friends 'n'
family. That makes me plenty happy.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
But it ain't the same. This is happiness that gets
my heart pumpin' hot.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
It's a happiness I can't get nowhere else... Do you
feel it too, Suzuka?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: The truth is, I've come to realize something.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: The view from up front, where I'm truly alone...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Well, it's not a place I can reach on my own.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
You keep running ahead of me... and that makes
me want to surpass you.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: No... I will surpass you. I'll show you that I can.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: That's why... I think this situation is okay for me.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Well, in that case, it's okay for me too! I
just wanna take ya on!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I know just how strong ya are, Suzuka—stronger
than anyone else!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Let's keep this happiness pipin' hot!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Okay.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I'll promise you this. I won't give up on taking the
lead.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The two have forged a bond, having grown closer
over their countless battles. I don't want to miss a
single moment from here.
